# Fix: Analytics reaction breakdown shows raw type strings instead of emojis

## Context
In the analytics reaction breakdown section (`.analytics-breakdown-emoji`), each row displays the raw `item.type` string (e.g. "fire", "mind_blown") instead of the corresponding emoji icon. The project already has `reactionConfig.js` with a `getReactionEmoji()` helper that maps type strings to emojis.

## Fix
**File: `client/src/components/Analytics/ReactionBreakdown.jsx`**

1. Import `getReactionEmoji` from `reactionConfig.js`
2. Replace `{item.type}` with `{getReactionEmoji(item.type)}` on line 21

**Reusing:** `getReactionEmoji` from `client/src/utils/reactionConfig.js` (already exists, maps type → emoji)

## Verification
1. Navigate to `/home/analytics`
2. Scroll to "Reaction breakdown" section
3. Confirm each row shows an emoji (🔥 ❤️ 🤯 👏 😂 😢) instead of text strings


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippet

content.text: Perfect! I found the draft plan. Here's what I discovered: ## Found Draft Plan The draft you're referring to was planned in your previous session (transcript ID: `cfec12d8-10aa-428b-a19d-fd2c2d27deda`). **Title:** Enhancement: Show reaction labels alongside emojis in analytics breakdown **What it involves:** After completing the reaction emoji fix task (which displayed emojis instead of raw strings in the analytics reaction breakdown), you planned the next enhancement: ### Changes needed: 1. **File: `client/src/components/Analytics/ReactionBreakdown.jsx`** - Import `REACTION_MAP` from `reactionConfig.js` (already imports `getReactionEmoji`) - After the emoji ``, add a label `` showing `REACTION_MAP[item.type]?.label` Current (line 22): ```jsx {getReactionEmoji(item.type)} ``` Update to: ```jsx {getReactionEmoji(item.type)} {REACTION_MAP[item.type]?.label} ``` 2. **File: `client/src/components/Analytics/AnalyticsDashboard.css`** - Add a new style rule for `.analytics-breakdown-label` after the existing `.analytics-breakdown-emoji` rule (around line 208): ```css .analytics-breakdown-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--color-text-secondary); min-width: 70px; } ``` **Goal:** Display emoji + written label text together (e.g., 🔥 Amazing, ❤️ Love, 🤯 Mind-blown) in the reaction breakdown section of the analytics dashboard. This plan is ready to implement whenever you're ready!
